acq_date.Description: Acquisition date (YYYY-MM-DD) parsed from the original file name.

original_filename.Description: Original recording file name on figshare (without extension).

recording_suffix.Description: One-letter suffix ('m' or 'n') from the original file name. Its meaning is not specified in the source publication.

original_run_index.Description: Run index from the original file name when a subject had multiple recordings on the same date; n/a otherwise.

n_events.Description: Total number of event markers in the recording.
